panel.heading: Nurturing Skills, Elevating Communities
panel.body: Access standardized training videos, complete knowledge-check assessments, unlock specialized badges, and monitor your personal growth journey.
panel.modulesBody: Interactive video tutorials designed specifically for ICDS & Anganwadi workflows.
panel.badgesBody: Structured knowledge checks to verify learning and earn official milestone badges.

login.welcomeSubtitle: Please choose a method to access your training dashboard.
login.signInSubtitle: Enter your email and password to access your training dashboard.
login.adminSubtitle: Enter administrator credentials to access the management panel.

toast.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.

signup.title: Create Account
signup.subtitle: Register now to start your standardized skills development path.

toast.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters long
toast.created: Account created! A verification code has been sent to your email.
toast.failed: Registration failed. Email might already exist.

otp.title: Verify Account
otp.subtitle: We have sent a 6-digit verification code to {{email}}.
otp.hint: Note: You can check your email inbox or copy the code printed in the backend terminal logs.

toast.noSession: No active session found. Please register or sign in.
toast.newCodeSent: New verification code sent to your email.
toast.resendFailed: Failed to resend code. Please try again.

forgot.title: Reset Password
forgot.subtitleRequest: Enter your email address and we'll send a 6-digit verification code.
forgot.subtitleReset: Enter the verification code and choose a new password.
forgot.notReceived: Didn't receive it? Check your email or backend terminal output.

toast.codeSent: If registered, a 6-digit reset code has been sent to your email.
toast.enterCodeAndPassword: Please enter the verification code and new password
toast.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters long
toast.resetSuccess: Password reset successfully! You can now sign in with your new password.
